##NAMES=Metavivianite
##RRUFFID=R130545
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Fe^2+^Fe^3+^_2_(PO_4_)_2_(OH)_2_·6H_2_O
##LOCALITY=Rapid Creek, Yukon Territory, Canada
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Rock Currier
##DESCRIPTION=Dull olive-green platy mass, associated with masses of brighter green acicular gormanite on brown siderite. Metavivianite is twinned around [1 -1 0].
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is not yet confirmed
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R130545
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 7.8525 b: 9.127 c: 4.66 alpha: 93.7 beta: 97.76 gamma: 108.33 volume: 312.1 crystal system: triclinic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
